Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1318 "MONOPOLYDELUXE-0880-1318" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0880 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Monopoly Deluxe.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0880 to set zero page address $04 to $92 to allow the game to start correctly.
